claim_boundary: this report freezes machine-, backend-, and toolchain-scoped numeric portability envelopes for the bounded float and mixed-numeric lanes. It keeps exact CPU-reference publication separate from suppressed non-CPU backends and bounded-approximate numeric families, and it does not claim generic Wasm numeric closure, backend-invariant float exactness, or full f64 portability
